taxonomy: Ovieda inermis is classified as a species within the genus Ovieda, which belongs to the family Podocarpaceae. This family is part of the order Araucariales and the class Pinopsida. The class Pinopsida is further grouped under the division Pinophyta, which includes all coniferous plants. The division Pinophyta is part of the kingdom Plantae, indicating that Ovieda inermis is a plant species. At the highest taxonomic level, Ovieda inermis is a member of the domain Eukarya.
